title: Red Ocean My First Christmas Bauble For Baby Personalised For Kids New Baby Girl Boy Christmas Tree Decoration Newborn Keepsake
features: Celebrate a baby's first Christmas with this personalised acrylic star decoration, crafted from high-quality glossy white acrylic and measuring 10cm by 10cm, designed to shine beautifully amongst festive lights.

Suitable For: baby's first Christmas decoration, personalised baby's first Christmas ornament, baby's first Christmas star, first Christmas keepsake, personalised Christmas bauble, baby's first Christmas decoration, personalised Christmas tree ornament for baby, customised acrylic star Christmas decoration, newborn Christmas gift keepsake, baby boy first Christmas decoration, baby girl first Christmas decoration, Christmas tree hanging ornament, festive keepsake gift
This 10cm x 10cm star plaque is handmade in the UK from high-quality 3mm white acrylic. The product is cut and printed with your chosen design and packed ready to gift.
Each plaque comes with red and black string for easy hanging on walls, hooks, or decorative displays, perfect for adding a sentimental touch to any room in the home.
Beautifully packaged and ready to gift, this plaque makes a lovely Babys First Christmas memento which you can keep and look back on for years to come!
description: Product description Mark the magic of a baby's very first festive season with this beautifully personalised acrylic Christmas star decoration. Measuring 10cm by 10cm, this keepsake ornament is crafted from durable white acrylic with a smooth glossy finish, designed to shine amongst the twinkling fairy lights of your Christmas tree. The festive design includes a cheerful Gingerbread man, presents, snowflakes and seasonal illustrations, combined with your chosen name and year to create a truly unique first Christmas decoration. Perfect as a baby's first Christmas bauble, a Christening or newborn gift, or a special keepsake for proud parents, this star captures the joy of the season in a way that can be treasured forever. Each star is supplied with both a red string and a black string, giving you the choice of how to display it. Whether it hangs proudly on the Christmas tree, decorates a fireplace garland, or is kept as a nursery ornament, this personalised Christmas decoration makes a charming addition to any festive display. Thoughtful, timeless and full of festive cheer, this acrylic star is the perfect way to celebrate a baby's first Christmas this year. A beautiful keepsake to be cherished year after year, it's more than just a decoration, it's a memory in the making. Personalisation information: After purchase, please send in your personalisation details. We need: - Name - Date Please take care when sending us information. We will follow your style of writing, including Capital Letters, punctuation and spelling. (If you do not provide us with these details then your item will be printed without any personalisation) Safety Warning Warning: Keep out of reach of children. Do not hang near heat sources or open flames. Always secure hanging strings to prevent entanglement or choking hazards.
